required_preferences.fact: Maintains regular video dates with her partner every Saturday evening — no longer meets in person on weekends due to distance

supersedes.fact: Schedules date nights with her partner only for weekends — never sees him during the workweek

required_preferences.fact: Temporarily avoids all jogging sessions — replaces morning runs with gentle stretching or relaxation routines as prescribed by her doctor

supersedes.fact: Jogging sessions are always before sunrise and solo — never runs in the evening or with others

required_preferences.fact: Reads nutrition labels and tracks sodium intake daily — never purchases packaged foods without reviewing sodium content first
Joins her sister's neighborhood parents group online to learn about local postpartum resources and parenting events in Seattle
Shops for groceries only on Sunday afternoons at the local farmers market — never buys groceries during the week
Sets daily reminders to take prescribed blood pressure medication at the same time every morning — never misses a dose

persona: An independent freelance consultant who regularly drafts contracts for clients
